# Runbook Template

```markdown
# <Imperative Title> (e.g., "Restart Inventory Service")

> One-line summary of what this does and when to use it.

## Prerequisites

- Bullet list of what must be true before starting

## Procedure

### Step 1 — <action summary>

Brief explanation (1-3 sentences).

\```bash
command --with-flags
\```

> Expected: `HTTP 200` within 5 s.

### Step 2 — <action summary>

...repeat...

## Verification

Commands + expected output to confirm success.

## Rollback / Recovery

How to undo changes if something goes wrong.

## Reference

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Owner | <team or person> |
| Last verified | <date> |
| Related docs | <links> |
```
